name: antd
description: An enterprise-class UI design language and React components implementation

scripts.build: npm run compile && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096' npm run dist
scripts.clean: antd-tools run clean && rimraf es lib coverage locale dist report.html artifacts.zip oss-artifacts.zip
scripts.compileOnly: npm run clean && antd-tools run compile
scripts.predeploy: antd-tools run clean && npm run site && cp CNAME _site && npm run test:site
scripts.deploy:china-mirror: git checkout gh-pages && git pull origin gh-pages && git push git@gitee.com:ant-design/ant-design.git gh-pages -f
scripts.predist: npm run version && npm run token:statistic && npm run token:meta && npm run style
scripts.dist: npm run ut-install-react-18 && antd-tools run dist
scripts.lint: npm run version && npm run tsc && npm run lint:script && npm run lint:biome && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:changelog && npm run lint:design-md
scripts.presite: npm run prestart && npm run style -- --layer='@layer theme, base, global, antd, components, utilities;'
scripts.site: dumi build && cp .surgeignore _site && npm run contributors
scripts.prestart: npm run version && npm run token:statistic && npm run token:meta && npm run lint:changelog && npm run style
scripts.test:site-update: npm run site && npm run test:site -- -u

title: Ant Design
